regex.target: .setName("使用 CSS 代码片段自定义提示框")

regex.source: .setDesc("Leave blank to render without a title.")
regex.target: .setDesc("留空以在无标题的情况下渲染。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Export a CSS snippet for custom callout types.")
regex.target: .setDesc("导出一个 CSS 代码片段以自定义提示类型。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose custom types to export as a JSON file that you can then share with other users.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择自定义类型导出为JSON文件，然后可以与其他用户共享。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Instead of managing it internally, Admonitions will maintain a CSS snippet to enable your custom types for callouts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Admonitions 将维护一个 CSS 代码片段，以便启用您的自定义类型呼叫提示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a new Admonition type. All custom Admonitions will also be usable as callouts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加一个新的提示类型。所有自定义提示也将可用作注目。")
.setDesc("从 JSON 定义导入提示信息。")

regex.source: .setDesc("A drop shadow will be added to admonitions.")
.setDesc("Collapsible admonitions & callouts will be either opened or closed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可折叠的警告和提示将被打开或关闭。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a 'copy content' button to admonitions & callouts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("为提示和侧边栏添加一个“复制内容”按钮。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Disable this setting to turn off admonition coloring by default. Can be overridden in the admonition definition.")
regex.target: .setDesc("禁用此设置可默认关闭警告框着色。可以在警告框定义中覆盖此设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Any admonition that does not have content inside it will be hidden.")
regex.target: .setDesc("任何没有内容的提示都将被隐藏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Font Awesome Free icons will be available in the item picker. Existing Admonitions defined using Font Awesome icons will continue to work.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Font Awesome 免费图标将在项目选择器中可用。已使用 Font Awesome 图标定义的警告框将继续生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Load an additional icon pack. This requires an internet connection.")
regex.target: .setDesc("加载额外的图标包。这需要互联网连接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Icon to display next to the title.")
.createEl("p",{text:"Obsidian 0.14 has introduced Callout boxes to its core functionality using the same syntax as the Microsoft Document callouts.",cls:"setting-item"})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"Obsidian 0.14 已在其核心功能中引入了callout，使用的是与 Microsoft Document callout相同的语法。",cls:"setting-item"})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"This has rendered the Microsoft Document syntax for Admonitions obsolete, but Admonitions can still be used to create and manage your custom callout types.",cls:"setting-item"})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"这使得 Microsoft Document 语法中的警告信息变得过时，但仍然可以使用Admonitions来创建和管理您的自定义callout。",cls:"setting-item"})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"Your existing code block Admonitions will always work!",cls:"setting-item"})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"您现有的代码块Admonitions将始终有效！",cls:"setting-item"})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"With large vaults, this could take awhile!"})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"处理大型库时，这可能需要一些时间！"})
